title: Transmission of zoonotic TB from humans to animals
body: "This rapid systematic review aimed to identify and summarise evidence on the risk of transmitting Mycobacterium tuberculosis complex species including M. bovis, M. caprae, M. microti, M. orygis, and M. TB from humans to animals.  This rapid systematic review searched for research published up to 11 November 2024 however no studies were identified for inclusion  "
